station.title: Student feedback layer
station.description: Student-facing root causes, recommendations, and feedback text.

metrics.adaptive_feedback:
=== ROOT CAUSES OF YOUR PERFORMANCE ===

Planning & Preparation (Priority: HIGH)
Your essay would benefit from pre-writing planning. Try: 1) Write thesis first, 2) Create outline, 3) Gather evidence, 4) Write draft, 5) Revise

Text Organization (Priority: MEDIUM)
Work on organizing your ideas clearly: Introduction (hook + thesis) -> Body (topic sentences + evidence) -> Conclusion (summary + reflection)

Argument Strength (Priority: MEDIUM)
Strengthen your arguments by: 1) Using credible evidence, 2) Explaining how evidence supports your claim, 3) Addressing counterarguments

Time Management (Priority: HIGH)
You appear to have written under time pressure. Start assignments early to allow time for revision and improvement.

=== FOR YOUR PROFILE (Disengaged Students - Low participation) ===
Focus on consistent effort and reflection on your writing.

=== SPECIFIC ACTIONS YOU SHOULD TAKE ===
1. RECOMMEND_BRAINSTORM: Student should spend time planning before writing
2. RECOMMEND_STRUCTURE_TRAINING: Focus on essay structure (intro/body/conclusion)
3. RECOMMEND_EVIDENCE_BUILDING: Teach use of evidence and reasoning
4. RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort

=== KEY INSIGHT ===
Your main challenge is organizing thoughts before writing.

=== RULE-BASED DIAGNOSTIC FEEDBACK ===
The essay's organization requires significant improvement. Cohesion between ideas is weak.; Your argument requires stronger support with clear evidence and examples.; Excellent! Seeking assistance demonstrates awareness of your learning needs and a strong commitment to improvement.
Elaboration prompt + staged drafting; Strategic feedback on structure; Higher-order feedback on support; Lexical enrichment; Strategic global revision; Dialogic scaffolding

=== RECOMMENDED INTERVENTIONS ===
توفير قالب تنظيم الفقرات; تقديم أمثلة لفقرات منظمة جيداً; تمرين توصيل الأفكار; تدريس استراتيجية CER (Claim-Evidence-Reasoning); تدريب على تطوير الحجج; جلسة نقاش حول الأمثلة الفعالة; تقديم إثراء إضافي; جلسة حوار توضيحي; تشجيع وتعزيز السلوك الإيجابي
Guided planning and idea expansion; Paragraph restructuring with model; CER scaffold and examples; Vocabulary expansion support; Teacher modeling of revision; Clarification conference
مواد متقدمة وتحديات إضافية
تعزيز وإثراء
recommendations: RECOMMEND_BRAINSTORM: Student should spend time planning before writing
RECOMMEND_EVIDENCE_BUILDING: Teach use of evidence and reasoning
RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort
